ranked_jobs.title: Product Manager, Commerce Systems
why: Role is focused on enterprise platform transformation by harmonizing disparate systems into a unified financial infrastructure platform
Strong emphasis on backend systems and API-first mindset aligns with platform infrastructure expertise
Cross-functional leadership and architecting control planes address system modernization and operating model improvement at scale
Remote work with a high-leverage team and strategic impact on Stripe's revenue platform
Involves large-scale system consolidation across billing, financial data warehouses, and seller systems

ranked_jobs.title: AI Delivery Lead
why: Role involves managing the adoption and integration of AI/automation capabilities across multiple products and programs, indicating enterprise-wide transformation.
Focus on governance, coordination, SOP/guideline development aligns with operating model redesign and platform modernization.
Remote position, which fits preferred work location.
Responsibilities include sequencing and capacity planning with agile practices indicating senior delivery leadership rather than junior or purely customer-facing work.

ranked_jobs.title: Credit Risk Program Manager, Risk Foundations
why: Role involves driving program and process incubation within a critical credit risk pillar and the broader risk organization, indicating enterprise-wide impact.
Focus on designing and implementing scalable risk-wide frameworks and foundational policies aligns with platform modernization and governance.
Cross-functional collaboration with Strategy, Product, Engineering, and Operations aligns well with large-scale system modernization and operating model redesign.
Remote role with significant execution and strategic planning responsibilities matches candidate's preference for remote, enterprise transformation work.

ranked_jobs.title: Strategy & Operations Program Manager, Risk Ops
why: Role involves leading complex global programs and high-impact strategic initiatives within Risk Operations, indicating experience with enterprise-wide operational improvements
Strong emphasis on cross-functional collaboration with multiple teams including Risk Product, Risk Engineering, Policy, and Data Science, suggesting broad organizational impact
Focus on operational excellence at scale and designing step-change improvements which aligns with platform transformation and modernization goals
Position is fully remote, which aligns with preferred remote roles

ranked_jobs.title: Product Manager, Banking as a Service
why: Role involves ownership of core APIs and platform products, which aligns with platform transformation and system modernization.
Involves collaboration across multiple internal teams (engineering, design, legal, risk, compliance), indicating cross-functional impact beyond a single business function.
Remote work option is available, which is preferred.
Focus on delivering scalable, performant financial services products with complex integration, supporting platform modernization.
